entry.prompt: CRISPR-Cas13-based RNA sensor: Cas13 cleaves a quenched GFP mRNA when trigger RNA is present

response: {"name": "CRISPR-Cas13-based RNA sensor", "organism": "Escherichia coli", "components": [{"name": "p_j23100", "type": "promoter", "description": "Constitutive promoter driving Cas13 expression"}, {"name": "rbs_cas13", "type": "rbs", "description": "Ribosome binding site for Cas13"}, {"name": "cas13", "type": "cds", "description": "Cas13 RNA-targeting nuclease"}, {"name": "t_cas13", "type": "terminator", "description": "Transcriptional terminator for cas13"}, {"name": "p_j23100_2", "type": "promoter", "description": "Constitutive promoter driving quenched GFP reporter mRNA"}, {"name": "rbs_gfp", "type": "rbs", "description": "Ribosome binding site for GFP reporter"}, {"name": "quenched_gfp", "type": "cds", "description": "Reporter mRNA encoding GFP with a quenched/fluorophore-quencher design that is cleaved by Cas13 upon trigger RNA detection"}, {"name": "t_gfp", "type": "terminator", "description": "Transcriptional terminator for reporter mRNA"}, {"name": "trigger_rna", "type": "other", "description": "Input trigger RNA that activates Cas13 collateral cleavage activity"}], "interactions": [{"from": "p_j23100", "to": "cas13", "type": "transcription"}, {"from": "rbs_cas13", "to": "cas13", "type": "translation"}, {"from": "p_j23100_2", "to": "quenched_gfp", "type": "transcription"}, {"from": "rbs_gfp", "to": "quenched_gfp", "type": "translation"}], "behavior": "In the absence of trigger RNA, Cas13 is expressed but remains inactive, and the quenched GFP reporter mRNA remains intact with low fluorescence. When trigger RNA is present, Cas13 becomes activated and cleaves the reporter mRNA, altering reporter output as a detection signal."}

entry.prompt: Cell-free CRISPR sensor: Cas12a activates with trigger DNA, cleaving a quenched fluorescent reporter in a TX-TL reaction
